name: uberfoods-test-suite
description: Complete testing suite for UberFoods platform

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:backend:unit && npm run test:frontend:unit
scripts.test:frontend:unit: cd ../frontend/customer-web && npm run test:coverage && cd ../driver-app && npm run test:coverage && cd ../restaurant-web && npm run test:coverage && cd ../admin-panel && npm run test:coverage
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:customer:e2e && npm run test:driver:e2e && npm run test:restaurant:e2e && npm run test:admin:e2e
scripts.test:security: npm run security:audit && npm run security:scan
scripts.security:audit: cd ../backend && npm audit --audit-level moderate && cd ../frontend/customer-web && npm audit --audit-level moderate && cd ../driver-app && npm audit --audit-level moderate && cd ../restaurant-web && npm audit --audit-level moderate && cd ../admin-panel && npm audit --audit-level moderate
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.report:coverage: istanbul-combine ../backend/coverage/lcov.info ../frontend/*/coverage/lcov.info -o combined-coverage.json && istanbul-report lcov --include combined-coverage.json --output-dir coverage-report
